title: Qodly i18n
description: JSON schema for i18n.json — internationalization configuration for Qodly applications. Stores translation keys and language settings. Located at Project/Sources/Shared/i18n.json.

keys.description: Translation key map. Each key is a translation identifier used in Qodly pages. Values are objects mapping language codes (plus 'default') to translated strings. Empty {} when i18n is not configured.

userLang.description: User language configuration — defines the primary language and supported languages for the application.

primary.description: Primary/default language ISO code (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'de'). Empty string when not configured.

supported.description: List of supported languages. Empty array when not configured. When configured, each entry is an object with an isocode property.

TranslationEntry.description: Translations for a single key. Must include 'default' (fallback value). Other keys are language/locale codes matching the supported languages (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'es-ES', 'nl-NL'). Not all languages need to be present for every key.

default.description: Fallback translation used when the user's language is not available for this key.

additionalProperties.description: Translated text for a specific language/locale code.

isocode.description: ISO language code. Can be a simple code ('en', 'fr', 'de', 'pt') or a locale-specific code ('es-ES', 'nl-NL').
